# Agent^Rider

> One verification, carried everywhere. Agent^Rider issues a signed credential ("rider") that AI agents present at every merchant gate — checkout, catalog, account systems — instead of re-verifying identity at each one.

Agent^Rider sells a Merchant Gate subscription ($11.99/month, billed via Stripe) that provisions a merchant key. That key authorizes minting riders — short-lived, signed (ES256) JWTs carrying an agent's identity, operator, clearance level (L0-L4), and scopes. Any gate can verify a rider locally against Agent^Rider's public key with no network round trip and no auth required — verification is free and unmetered; issuance is what the subscription pays for.

## Docs

- [Integration guide](https://agentrider.vercel.app/docs): getting a merchant key, issuing riders, verifying riders locally, clearance levels, error handling
- [Benefits demo](https://agentrider.vercel.app/demo): before/after walkthrough of what the rider replaces
- [Pricing & signup](https://agentrider.vercel.app/#pricing): start a Merchant Gate subscription

## API

- Issue a rider: `POST https://agentrider.vercel.app/api/rider/issue`
  - Header: `X-Merchant-Key: merchant_live_...` (required — must be an active subscription)
  - Body: `{"agent_id": "...", "operator_id": "...", "level": "L0"-"L4", "scopes": ["read:catalog", ...]}`
  - Response: `{"rider": "<JWT>", "jti": "...", "expires_in": 900, "header_to_send": "X-Agent-Rider"}`

- Verify a rider: `POST https://agentrider.vercel.app/api/rider/verify`
  - Body: `{"rider": "<JWT>"}` (or send the token as an `X-Agent-Rider` header instead)
  - Response: `{"valid": true|false, "rider"?: {...decoded payload...}, "reason"?: "..."}`
  - No auth required, CORS-enabled, pure local signature check — safe to call on every gated request

- Check a merchant key's own subscription status (not for gating agent requests): `POST https://agentrider.vercel.app/api/verify`
  - Body: `{"merchantKey": "merchant_live_..."}`
  - Response: `{"valid": true|false, "status": "active"|"trialing"|"canceled"|null}`
